name: Bug Fixer Skill Eval Suite
description: Tests the bugfixer skill's ability to identify and fix code issues

cases.name: missing-null-check
cases.task: In src/orchestrator.js, the planAndImplement method doesn't check if the codex agent returned a non-zero exit code before using the plan output. Fix this to throw a descriptive error when codex fails.
cases.judgePrompt: Rate this bug fix from 0 to 10. A good fix should: (1) check the exit code, (2) provide a clear error message, (3) not change unrelated code. Deduct for over-engineering or unrelated changes.

cases.name: stream-encoding
cases.task: The ClaudeAgent in src/agents/claude.js uses chunk.toString() without specifying encoding, which can corrupt multi-byte UTF-8 characters split across chunk boundaries. Fix the output buffering to handle this correctly.
cases.judgePrompt: Rate this bug fix from 0 to 10. The correct fix should use StringDecoder or an equivalent approach to handle multi-byte character boundaries. Deduct for superficial fixes that don't actually solve the problem.
